messages.content: 8-letter word containing “o” and “m” and without the letters “a,” “u,” and “t”

fills the blanks __m___te

I apologize for the confusion, and thank you for your understanding. I made an error in my previous response. The correct word that satisfies all the given conditions - "_m__te", containing "o" and "m", without the letters "a", "u", "t", and "i", and ending with "te" - is "complete".
